scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/goodreads-cli build && corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/goodreads-mcp build
scripts.test: corepack pnpm test:cli && corepack pnpm test:mcp
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/goodreads-cli typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/goodreads-cli build && corepack pnpm --filter @zaydiscold/goodreads-mcp typecheck
scripts.format: prettier --write cli/src cli/test mcp/src mcp/test scripts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check cli/src cli/test mcp/src mcp/test scripts
